Jan 28
IOS app update
We’ve redesigned the iOS app with liquid glass styling and added powerful new record widgets.
Design
Feature
Enhancement
Jan 14
Emails on Deals and Custom Objects
Emails are now available across all record types — including Deals and Custom Objects — so you can track conversations in any context.
Design
Feature
Enhancement
Jan 14
Associated notes in meetings
Meeting context where you need it.
Design
Enhancement
Jan 14
New Apps: Productboard and JustCall
Bring customer conversations and product insights together in Attio with new App Store arrivals.
Feature
Enhancement
Jan 14
Changelog (January 14, 2026)
You can now reuse the slug of a workspace that has been deleted.

hits.title: Why We Chose the Name Attio
Show HN: Auxx.ai – Customer Support CRM (Mix of Attio and N8n)
Attio wants to build the CRM for the Airtable generation
Launch HN: Chert (YC P26) – Twilio for iMessage
AT&T giving away FREE LTE IoT starterkits
Show HN: Ano – no-noise team chat with your code agent as your assistant
Show HN: FirstDistro – I lost a $5k/mo customer overnight

analysis.name: Attio
analysis.value_proposition: AI-native CRM with a universal context layer that orchestrates revenue agents to build pipeline, accelerate deals, and compound revenue.
analysis.ideal_customer: Scale-ups, SaaS startups, SMBs, and investors running B2B revenue motions who want an AI-native CRM alternative to Salesforce/HubSpot

features.name: ask attio
features.description: Natural-language AI search and record creation across the CRM
features.evidence_quote: Ask Attio - Search and create with AI

features.name: universal context
features.description: AI context layer that unifies every customer signal into one live picture
features.evidence_quote: The only CRM with Universal Context™

features.name: ai agents
features.description: Autonomous revenue agents that work accounts, capture signals, and move deals forward

features.name: workflows
features.description: Orchestration engine for any revenue motion with AI agents and automations
features.evidence_quote: Orchestrate revenue agents with the new Workflows

features.name: sequences
features.description: Personalized outreach and multi-step email sequencing

features.name: call intelligence
features.description: Record and analyze meetings automatically

features.name: reporting
features.description: Real-time insight, funnel, and time-in-stage reports

features.name: insight reports
features.description: Historical values, funnel, time in stage, stage-changed insights

features.name: funnel reports
features.description: Pipeline funnel analytics

features.name: historical attributes
features.description: Time-based comparisons of attribute values

features.name: targets
features.description: Set and track goals against reports

features.name: data model
features.description: Custom objects, custom attributes, and relationships
features.evidence_quote: Data model - Sync and enrich your data

features.name: custom objects
features.description: Define bespoke object types beyond People/Companies/Deals

features.name: custom relationship attributes
features.description: Define relationships between records

features.name: record and entry templates
features.description: Reusable templates for records and entries

features.name: automatic data enrichment
features.description: Auto-enrich company and people records with firmographic data

features.name: company enrichment
features.description: Enrich companies with name, description, logo, category, social, location, employee count, ARR, funding
features.evidence_quote: Company enrichment - Name, Description, Logo, Category, Social media, Location, Employee count, ARR, Funding raised

features.name: people enrichment
features.description: Enrich people records with name, description, profile picture, social, location
features.evidence_quote: People enrichment - Name, Description, Profile picture, Social media, Location

features.name: real-time contact syncing
features.description: Automatically sync contacts as they change

features.name: email sync
features.description: Bidirectional email sync from Gmail/Outlook onto records

features.name: calendar sync
features.description: Sync calendar events onto records

features.name: emails on records
features.description: Email threads attached to any record type, including deals and custom objects
features.evidence_quote: Emails on Deals and Custom Objects — Emails are now available across all record types

features.name: email sharing controls
features.description: Manage subject line and full-content visibility across workspace and individuals
features.evidence_quote: Manage visibility of full email content for your entire workspace and individual users

features.name: bulk email sending
features.description: Send 10-50 emails at once depending on plan
features.evidence_quote: Bulk email sending - 10 emails at once / 50 emails at once

features.name: enhanced email sending
features.description: Higher email limits (1,000+/mo) beyond the free tier

features.name: individual email requests
features.description: Per-request email visibility controls

features.name: remove attio branding
features.description: Remove 'Sent with Attio' from outbound email

features.name: auto-labeling
features.description: AI auto-labels emails/records

features.name: auto-summaries
features.description: AI-generated summaries of email/activity content

features.name: communication intelligence
features.description: First/last interaction, connection strength, strongest connection metrics
features.evidence_quote: Communication intelligence - First interaction, Last interaction, Connection strength, Strongest connection

features.name: manual activity logging
features.description: Manually log activities on records

features.name: activity timeline
features.description: Redesigned per-record timeline eliminating noise
features.evidence_quote: New activity timeline — Eliminate noise in your records

features.name: private lists
features.description: Personal lists not shared with the workspace

features.name: notes
features.description: Notes on records

features.name: tasks
features.description: Task management on records

features.name: meetings
features.description: Meeting tracking with associated notes

features.name: files on records
features.description: Upload files to Deals and Custom Objects
features.evidence_quote: Files on Deals and Custom objects — Keep contracts, decks, and documents where they belong

features.name: files api
features.description: Query, upload, and delete files via API
features.evidence_quote: Files API — Query, upload, and delete files across your workspace via API

features.name: web research agent
features.description: AI attribute that runs web research to enrich record fields
features.evidence_quote: Web research agent — Get richer, more reliable data across your workspace

features.name: ask attio in slack
features.description: Query Attio records, calls, emails from Slack
features.evidence_quote: Ask Attio in Slack — Search through records, calls, emails, and conversation history

features.name: mcp server
features.description: Attio-hosted MCP server for AI ecosystem integration
features.evidence_quote: MCP server — Connect Attio to the AI ecosystem

features.name: api access
features.description: Full REST API for building on Attio

features.name: webhooks
features.description: Webhook events for record changes

features.name: app sdk
features.description: SDK for building Attio apps

features.name: developer platform
features.description: MCP, API, and SDK for building on Attio
features.evidence_quote: Developer Platform - Build with the Attio MCP, API, and SDK

features.name: app store
features.description: Marketplace of 100+ third-party integrations
features.evidence_quote: App Store - Apps & integrations - Over 10 new apps just landed

features.name: integration blocks
features.description: Reusable integration blocks inside workflows

features.name: chatgpt store integration
features.description: Attio available in ChatGPT app store
features.evidence_quote: Attio is now in the ChatGPT store

features.name: claude integration
features.description: Search, manage, and update Attio from Claude
features.evidence_quote: Claude - Search, manage, and update Attio from Claude

features.name: raycast integration
features.description: Attio MCP available in Raycast
features.evidence_quote: Attio is now available in Raycast — install the MCP server

features.name: notion custom agents
features.description: Pre-configured MCP connection in Notion custom agents
features.evidence_quote: Attio is now a pre-configured MCP connection in Notion Custom Agents

differentiators: The only CRM with Universal Context™ — AI context layer unifying every customer signal
AI-native CRM built for revenue agents (not bolted-on AI)
Adaptive data model with custom objects for any business shape (scale-ups, SaaS, SMBs, investors)
Native MCP server for AI ecosystem integration (ChatGPT, Claude, Notion, Raycast)
'Next generation of CRM' positioning vs Salesforce/HubSpot legacy stack

praised: 'When I first opened Attio, I instantly got the feeling this was the next generation of CRM.' — Margaret Shen, Head of Business Operations at Modal
Positioned as CRM for the Airtable generation (HN post)

free_tier.limits: Up to 3 seats, 3 objects, 50,000 records, 200 emails/mo, 100 seat credits + 250 workspace credits/mo, up to 3 reports

tiers.name: Free
tiers.headline_inclusions: Real-time contact syncing, automatic data enrichment, up to 3 seats

tiers.name: Plus
tiers.headline_inclusions: Private lists, enhanced email sending, no seat limits, 5 objects, 250k records

tiers.name: Pro
tiers.headline_inclusions: Call Intelligence & sequences, advanced permissions, priority support, 12 objects, 1M records

tiers.name: Enterprise
tiers.headline_inclusions: Unlimited objects, unlimited teams, advanced security & admin, SSO, SCIM, migration service

pricing.notes: AI credits are tiered per seat (100/500/1000/2500) and per workspace (250/1500/10000/custom). Additional workspace credit blocks can be purchased: +5k=$70-85/mo, +10k=$120-150/mo, +25k=$260-330/mo, +50k=$475-595/mo. 14-day Pro free trial. Annual billing saves 20%. Free tier capped at 3 seats.
